prestazioni: FA24F 2.4L turbocharged boxer engine: Cobb Accessport Stage 2+ tune with custom E30 ethanol blend mapping, targeting 320 whp and 380 lb-ft torque via direct port injection upgrades (ID1050x injectors) and a Garrett GTX3071R Gen II turbocharger with billet compressor wheel (62mm inducer, 84mm exducer) and 0.82 A/R turbine housing, paired with a custom 3.5-inch catted downpipe (Nameless Performance) and a GrimmSpeed 3-port boost control solenoid for precise wastegate actuation

Full drivetrain reinforcement: STI 6-speed manual transmission swap (TJ6M6) with a PPG short-throw shifter, upgraded dual-mass flywheel (Sachs Performance), and a carbon fiber driveshaft (The Driveshaft Shop) to handle increased torque, alongside a Cusco 2-way limited-slip differential (250Nm torque bias) and reinforced rear subframe bushings (Whiteline)

Suspension and braking overhaul: Öhlins Road & Track coilovers (DFV) with 8-position adjustable compression/rebound damping, custom valving for the Ascent’s 2,000kg+ weight, and helper springs for ride height retention, paired with Brembo GT 6-piston front (380mm rotors) and 4-piston rear (355mm rotors) big brake kit with two-piece floating rotors and Ferodo DS2500 pads, plus a Goodridge G-Stop stainless steel brake line kit
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works widebody kit (Ascent-specific, 50mm front/60mm rear fender flares) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, paired with a Rocket Bunny rear diffuser and a custom 3D-printed front splitter (Aeroflow Dynamics) for -20% front lift at 120 mph

Full custom vinyl wrap (3M 2080 Gloss Flip Psychedelic) with a matte black roof and mirror caps, complemented by a custom LED light bar integrated into the front grille (Lux Halo) and sequential LED taillights (VLand JDM-style, DOT-approved)

Interior overhaul: Recaro Sportster CS seats (heated/ventilated, Alcantara suede with red stitching) paired with a custom roll cage (Custom Cages UK, 6-point bolt-in) wrapped in red leather, a Momo Prototipo steering wheel (380mm, suede), and a full carbon fiber dash overlay (Seibon) with a 12.3-inch digital gauge cluster (AEM CD-7) replacing the stock infotainment
